reviews.review_title: The best game in the world
reviews.review_description: The owner is really nice. I met him. He’s like very very nice. He gave me moderator and I just asked ￼he didn’t give me an attitude. He just gave it to me and then I asked for admin. He gave it to me then I asked for owner powers he gave it to me. He is so nice. You should really play this game, but then I lost my admin moderator￼ and owner powers. I don’t know why but it’s fine. It’s still the best game.

i like this game, it has ton of entertaining gamemodes that will literally make me play until my headset dies. i literally got mod in a few days after joining their discord server. the community is really nice and kind. the only problem is that there isnt that much people that play it, most of the time i just see mods, admins, co-owners and owners. this game could blow up in the future. 

my honest opinion on the game: 10/10

reviews.review_title: What I think about the game
reviews.review_description: The game is really good and the owner is nice moderators are very nice to you on your first day and they also teach you how to play.
Can't wait to see what this game is gonna become in the future

I suggest you download this game it's very fun
I got admin :D

reviews.review_title: This is the greatest game ever
reviews.review_description: I only played for the first time and I already got moderator but the sad thing is barely anyone is playing except for admins mods and co-owners, I wish this was popular
